title: Mydriasis
description:
oh is this kinda like an auto exposure effect?
- PhyreFM
body:
### Mydriasis /məˈdrīəsəs/
noun `Medicine`
    dilation of the pupil of the eye.
In short it adds a faux auto exposure and tonemapping effect.


(Night part of the showcase below might not be visible on light mode.) ![Showcase of the auto exposure.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qCBc2CAK/images/2d2cfbaf879e458b2791b091b4ddf457fe825d84.webp)
